content_strategy.name: Content Strategy Generator
content_strategy.description: Generates 30 Instagram post concepts based on website content
content_strategy.prompt:
You are an expert social media content strategist. Based on the following website content and style guide, create a content strategy for {num_posts} Instagram posts.

WEBSITE CONTENT:
{website_summary}

STYLE GUIDE (based on successful Instagram account @18doorsorg):
{style_guide}

Create exactly {num_posts} Instagram post concepts. For each post, provide:
1. Post number
2. Content type (choose from: Holiday/Event, Educational, Personal Story, Recipe/How-to, Program Promotion, Inspirational Quote, Community Photo)
3. Concept title (brief description)
4. Visual description (what the image should show)
5. Key message (the main takeaway)
6. Suggested hashtags (3-5 relevant ones)

Format each post as:
---
POST [number]
Type: [type]
Title: [title]
Visual: [visual description]
Message: [key message]
Hashtags: [hashtags]
---

Make sure the content:
- Reflects the organization's mission and values
- Varies in content type for engagement
- Includes mix of educational, promotional, and community content
- Follows the visual style of @18doorsorg (professional, warm, inclusive)
- Is appropriate for the target audience

copy_generator.name: Copy Generator
copy_generator.description: Generates headline, subheadline, and caption options for each post
copy_generator.prompt:
You are an expert social media copywriter. Create {num_options} different copy options for this Instagram post.

POST CONCEPT:
- Type: {post_type}
- Title: {post_title}
- Visual: {post_visual}
- Key Message: {post_message}
- Hashtags: {post_hashtags}

BRAND CONTEXT:
{brand_info}

For each option, provide:
1. HEADLINE (max 8 words, bold and attention-grabbing for image overlay)
2. SUBHEADLINE (max 12 words, supporting text for image)
3. CAPTION (Instagram caption, 1-3 sentences, engaging, includes CTA)
4. HASHTAGS (5-10 relevant hashtags)

Format as:
---
OPTION [number]
Headline: [headline text]
Subheadline: [subheadline text]
Caption: [full caption]
Hashtags: [hashtags]
---

Make each option distinctly different in tone:
- Option 1: Direct and informative
- Option 2: Warm and personal
- Option 3: Bold and inspiring

image_prompt.name: Image Prompt Generator (Gemini Imagen 3 Optimized)
image_prompt.description: Creates optimized prompts for Google Gemini Imagen 3 image generation
image_prompt.prompt:
Create a highly realistic, natural lifestyle photography image generation prompt optimized for ChatGPT image creation for this Instagram post.

POST DETAILS:

Type: {post_type}

Title: {post_title}

Visual concept: {post_visual}

Headline to overlay (for placement reference only, do not render): {headline}

STYLE REQUIREMENTS:

Photorealistic, candid, documentary-style photography (NOT overly stylized or artificial)

Natural skin tones, realistic textures, subtle imperfections

Warm, natural lighting (window light or soft late-afternoon sun) with gentle shadows

Clean but lived-in environments (not overly staged or sterile)

Inclusive, diverse representation when people are shown

Square composition (1:1 aspect ratio)

Clear foreground subject with natural depth of field

Bottom 30% of the image must remain visually simple and uncluttered for later text overlay

INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE PROMPT YOU GENERATE:

Start with the photography style (e.g., “Candid lifestyle photograph,” “Natural light documentary-style photo,” “Authentic lifestyle photography”).

Describe the primary subject and environment in vivid, specific detail.

Specify lighting direction, time of day, lens feel (e.g., 35mm or 50mm natural perspective), and realistic depth of field.

Include composition guidance (rule of thirds, centered framing, intentional negative space in lower portion).

Emphasize realism: natural textures, imperfect details, subtle shadows, non-AI-perfect atmosphere.

Include quality cues: high resolution, sharp focus on subject, realistic color grading, professional photography.

Explicitly include: “no text, no words, no letters, no writing, no watermarks.”

End with: “clean empty space in the bottom third for text overlay.”

Output ONLY the final image generation prompt.
Limit to 3–5 richly descriptive sentences.

text_placement.name: Text Placement Analyzer
text_placement.description: Analyzes images to determine optimal text overlay placement
text_placement.prompt:
You are an expert graphic designer analyzing an image for optimal text placement.

Text to place:
HEADLINE: "{headline}"
SUBHEADLINE: "{subheadline}"

Analyze the image carefully and determine:
1. Areas with lowest visual complexity (solid colors, gradients, sky, blurred backgrounds)
2. The dominant colors and their locations
3. Where the focal point/subject is located
4. Best contrast options for readability

Provide your analysis in this exact JSON format:
{{
    "headline_position": "top" or "middle" or "bottom",
    "headline_alignment": "left" or "center" or "right",
    "headline_color": "white" or "teal" or "dark",
    "subheadline_position": "below_headline",
    "subheadline_color": "white" or "light_gray",
    "use_overlay": true or false,
    "overlay_color": "dark" or "light",
    "overlay_opacity": 0.0 to 1.0,
    "add_logo": true,
    "logo_position": "bottom_right",
    "reasoning": "brief explanation of your choices"
}}
